evidence_quotes.quote: They are at risk of becoming services as opposed to products with developers reserving the right to terminate it at any time rendering the game you bought unplayable.
These products should have an end-of-life plan to allow consumers who bought a game to play it in perpetuity even if it isn't maintained by developers.

paragraphs.text: I fully support this act and would like to ask the European Commision to also consider the issue of digital ownership, specifally of videogames. They are at risk of becoming services as opposed to products with developers reserving the right to terminate it at any time rendering the game you bought unplayable. These products should have an end-of-life plan to allow consumers who bought a game to play it in perpetuity even if it isn't maintained by developers.
